title: BEM-841 continue mailbox repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:42 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b840=load('governance/state/bem840_current_claude_mailbox_system_status.json')
missing=b840.get('missing',[])
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol_next'
    next_action='process real Claude response and prepare agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='repair_dispatch_results_next'
    next_action='repair workflow dispatch results proof first'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='repair_claude_runtime_next'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime-state proof'
else:
    status='repair_real_claude_response_next'
    next_action='repair real Claude response writer/provider path'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem840_status':b840.get('status'),'bem840_works_end_to_end':b840.get('works_end_to_end'),'bem840_missing':missing,'watchdog_interval_minutes':1,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_continue_after_mailbox_status_report.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_continue_after_mailbox_status_report.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Continue After Mailbox Status Report | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Watchdog interval: 1 minute. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Watchdog interval: 1 minute'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_continue_after_mailbox_status_report.json','governance/reports/bem841_continue_after_mailbox_status_report.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Created active next repair task after BEM-840 mailbox status report so reporting does not stop development')
